keyThemes: 🚨 RW CHURN SPIKE: $500+/day for about a week (Randall, Apr 9 in #sds-leads). 21-reply thread — hottest operational issue. Nick P investigating prevention (Prosperstack?). Brian S + Randall have OJ-playbook ideas to try. Annualizes to $1.3M+ at risk.

🚨 REVENUE FORECAST DECLINING: Craig's Week 2 reforecast (Apr 15) shows SDS Affiliate TOTAL down $1.213M to $16.342M. Bookies worst (-$540K to $3.63M). RW down from $5.94M peak. GAN/Partnerships more conservative. Only Local held flat. 'Still on pace to beat total target' but growth opps must materialize.

🔥 BET365 MICHIGAN LAUNCH: Embargoed until Apr 18, affiliate go-live May 5 (Jamie). Matt mobilized all assets across RW/OJ/DGF/Local — emails, banners, social, chats with b365 links for ALL Michigan users. Material near-term revenue upside.

📈 RW AFFILIATE RECORD: $597K March — record single month (prev $528K Oct '23). 3.5K NDCs. Revenue +571% YoY. Already eclipsed full 2025 revenue ($1.45M vs $1.07M) in 100 days. Prediction markets growing fast: Jan $0 → Feb $9.7K → Mar $29.4K.

⚠️ NY AG SUBPOENA WAS DUE APR 9: Ryan shared detailed analysis Apr 1. Widget branding debate now has regulatory dimensions. Matt wants 'OddsJam' on consumer widgets, Karl argues Optic is correct for B2B. Monitoring for AG follow-up.

🏗️ PRODUCT VELOCITY: Dynasty tools live (50K+ searches/mo target). RW Breaking News tool demo'd (Jake L, Apr 14). OpticOdds Claude MCP in prod + PR coverage. OJ Baseball bot automated ($0.30/day, viral). Post-offsite execution momentum high.

👤 RW TRANSITION: Harry Thompson leaving (told team Apr 6). Kurt Kroll 2mo paternity in June. Vincenzo planning backend/frontend lead split. Nick P ramping — first priority fantasy football draft assistant. Andrew Parr likely lead. Whale picker contractor (Matthew, $50/hr) approved.

💰 BETSYNDICATE PROGRESS: $8-8.5K MRR, ~170 paying subs, 800 freemium signups, $35K gross total. Breakeven projected by NFL. Toad Sports + NASCAR Digital interested in BetFinder integration. Vincenzo skeptical of Roth ('cowboy, waste of time').

📱 SMART MONEY STUCK: Still 20 subs (2 annual, 18 monthly). Lucas made short-term scoring fixes but more needed. Jeremy: 'at 20 subs there's a larger issue around demand and customer objections.' Needs long-form talent video + marketing push.

🤖 AUTOMATION THESIS VALIDATED: Tyler's OJ Baseball bot ($0.30/day, 810 followers/350K impressions in 48hrs). RW Instagram +400% YoY (carousels). Craig automating 90%+ of Search workflows. Clark building content ideation AI. RW Breaking News tool live. 'Humans as orchestrators not executors.'

attention.name: RW Churn Spike

issues.action: Get Nick's churn analysis ASAP. Confirm Prosperstack offers. Apply OJ churn playbook. This is the #1 operational fire.

nick/ randall flagged $500+/day churn on rw for the last week. what churn prevention do we have in place? prosperstack? what are the offers?

brian s has some ideas from the oj playbook — loop him in.

this is the most urgent thing on ur plate rn

lmk

issues.text: Subpoena duces tecum from NY AG Letitia James — was due April 9. Targets Gambling.com/OddsJam/OpticOdds explicitly. Ryan shared detailed analysis Apr 1. Widget branding debate has regulatory dimensions. No update on legal response status since due date.
issues.action: Confirm legal response was filed. Monitor for AG follow-up.

issues.text: Widget branding: Matt wants OddsJam on consumer-facing, Karl argues Optic for B2B. Featured Parlays product scoping underway in Linear. Yahoo interested in widgets.
issues.action: Resolve branding policy: OJ consumer / Optic B2B. Get reskin timeline from Karl.

attention.name: Jeremy Tran

issues.action: Push Poly to close. Review algo architecture doc. Connect Jeremy with Kalshi contact for oAuth.

issues.text: OJ+DGF subs continuing YoY decline. Q1 actuals: Jan $1.50M, Feb $1.37M, Mar $1.35M — each month down. Trial abuse flagged via Verisoul (36-reply thread investigating accuracy, Apr 1). App store reviews trending 1-star (Randall flagged Apr 11, 26-reply thread).
issues.action: Track PI growth as offset. Validate Verisoul trial abuse flags. Address app store review problem — get affiliates to leave positive reviews.

issues.text: Bookies worst decliner in Week 2 reforecast: $4.17M → $3.63M (-$540K). Exit clicks -22% March, -50%+ YoY. Partnerships down to $5.67M → lower (GAN declining). BetSyndicate bright spot: $8.5K MRR now, 170 subs, breakeven by NFL.
issues.action: Craig's restructure plan in motion (7+ heads). Track BetSyndicate as offset. Toad Sports + NASCAR Digital new BetFinder prospects.

issues.text: Partnerships -46% exit clicks in March (spam sites returning in SERPs). Craig's Week 2 reforecast more conservative about summer and EOY. Alberta launch flagged as growth opportunity.
issues.action: Monitor SERP volatility. Push Alberta launch as upside catalyst.

issues.text: GAN/BetFinder — Jamie 'fairly confident' closes within 1 month (from ~Apr 8). Toad Sports asking about BetFinder pricing — Matt suggests 'float 10k one-time softly.' NASCAR Digital also interested.
issues.action: Track GAN close. Price Toad Sports ($10K one-time or rev share). Pursue NASCAR Digital.

mbr.title: OddsJam / Optic Combined — Feb 2026
mbr.insight: Fewer subs but higher value. Fantasy (-61%) and EV (-59%) tiers hemorrhaging. Platinum and Sharp Money are bright spots. ARPS up 15%. Prediction Insiders ($175K MRR, up from $162K) is the key offset.

mbr.title: RotoWire — Feb/Mar 2026
mbr.insight: Reliable base performing well. Direct traffic exploded +197.8%. SEO declined -13.3% but offset by direct surge. Affiliate revenue breakout at +236% YoY. Pricing move ($84→$99+) in play.

mbr.title: Key Concerns to Watch
mbr.insight: Three verticals underperforming budget. OJ labor cost ratio jumped from 13% to 20% — headcount holding while revenue declines. Monitor whether Prediction Insiders revenue can offset B2C decline by Q2.
